vintageessentials:moddesc: Essential commands and quality of life improvements
vintageessentials:sort-done: Inventory sorted by name (A-Z) - Hotbar and offhand preserved
vintageessentials:lock-enabled: Slot locking mode ENABLED. Click inventory slots to lock them. ({0}/{1} locked)
vintageessentials:lock-max-reached: Cannot lock more slots. Maximum is {0}.
vintageessentials:lock-mode-on: Locking mode ON - Click inventory slots to lock/unlock them
vintageessentials:config-stackinfo:
Applies to items that initially stack 16 or more
(Requires game restart to take effect)
vintageessentials:config-saved: Settings saved! Stack size changes require a game restart to take effect.
vintageessentials:config-presskey: Press any key combination for {0} (press Escape to cancel)
vintageessentials:conflict-presskey: Press any key combination (you can use Ctrl, Shift, Alt modifiers)
vintageessentials:feature-chestradius: Chest Radius Inventory - Opens a dialog showing all items in chests within 15 blocks. Allows quick searching and management.
vintageessentials:feature-sort: Player Inventory Sort - Sorts your inventory alphabetically, keeping locked slots in place.
vintageessentials:feature-lock: Toggle Slot Locking - Enables/disables locking mode. When active, click slots to lock/unlock them.
vintageessentials:feature-config: VintageEssentials Settings - Opens the mod configuration dialog.
vintageessentials:loaded: VintageEssentials loaded! Press Ctrl+Shift+V to open settings or use /veconfig
blockdesc-portablecraftingtable: A portable crafting station with internal storage that can access items from nearby containers.
vintageessentials:crafttable-nopull: No matching items found in storage or nearby containers
vintageessentials:crafttable-pickedup: Crafting table picked up with contents
vintageessentials:crafttable-placed: Crafting table placed with restored contents
vintageessentials:crafttable-storageinfo:
Storage: {0}/{1} slots used
Shift+Right-click to pick up
vintageessentials:crafttable-autofill-mi: Missing ingredients - not all items available in storage or nearby containers
